description_long: This is a compact, retro-style record player with a square, rounded-corner case in a soft pink color. The lid is hinged at the back and can be opened to reveal the turntable platter and tonearm inside. The platter is circular, black, and centrally located, with a visible spindle in the middle. The tonearm is slender, light pink, and rests on the right side of the platter, with a small stylus at its end. The exterior is smooth and glossy, with no visible control knobs or buttons on the top or sides. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on clean lines and a playful, modern aesthetic.
description: A compact, pink, retro-style record player with a hinged lid, black platter, and minimalist design. The tonearm and stylus are visible inside, with no external controls.
description_view_0: Front view shows the closed, smooth pink lid with rounded corners and no visible controls.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid open, revealing the black platter and pink tonearm inside the case.
description_view_2: Top-down view with the lid open, clearly displaying the black platter, spindle, and the tonearm resting on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid open, showing the platter and tonearm from a different angle.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and black, occupying the central area inside the case. It has a smooth, matte finish with a visible central spindle and a circular groove pattern, contrasting with the pink base. The platter is proportionally large compared to the overall size of the record player, taking up most of the interior space.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, slender, and light pink, positioned to the right of the platter. It is slightly curved and appears to be made of plastic or lightweight metal, with a smooth, glossy finish. The tonearm is resting over the platter, with a visible joint at the base for pivoting.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible as a small, distinct component at the end of the tonearm. It is tiny, likely made of metal or hard plastic, and appears to be attached securely to the tonearm, serving as the needle for reading records.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present as the hinged lid of the record player. It is made of opaque pink plastic, matching the body, and is attached at the back with visible hinges. The cover is currently open, allowing access to the platter and tonearm.
